address_line_1.description: The street address of the customer's location.

address_line_2.description: Additional address information such as apartment or suite number.

city.description: The city of the customer's location.

state.description: The state or province of the customer's location.

postal_code.description: The postal or ZIP code of the customer's location.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the customer's location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the customer's location.
